title: PR-2 Pixi interpolation and focused resident HUD
summary: Consume projection v2 in the default Web route, add snapshot interpolation and player-visible target/path/work/progress/reason presentation without client authority.
acceptance: The default Web route consumes only the already-negotiated schema4/GameSession projection v2 public roots and never imports or falls back to projection v1, WEB_PRODUCT_GATE_READ_MODEL, reviewed playback or an advance/wait/drain clock

Pixi retains previous/current coherent authoritative snapshots and interpolates visual X/Y and animation phase only; it clamps the interval, freezes while paused and snaps on generation change, teleport/route discontinuity or invalid previous basis without writing position, route, job or progress authority

At 1x, an authoritative route longer than four tiles is visible across multiple real render frames, route/target markers follow the v2 route window, and working shows at least two changing product-consumed progress projections before completion
Resident/job badges distinguish idle, claiming, moving, working, blocked, completed, failed and interrupted plus the approved work kinds without static fixture prose or test-only pawn filtering

The focused HUD shows global time/pause/requested 1x/2x/4x state, no more than concise relevant alerts, and selected-resident work kind, target, priority need, schedule/capability context, progress, structured reason and read-only inspection suggestion; it does not dump all resident diagnostics

Pause, 1x, 2x and 4x controls use real keyboard/mouse events and send only public Pause/SetSpeed messages. They never tick the world directly, use zero as a speed, create jobs, change priorities or introduce PR-3 selection/build commands

Eight visible residents, resources, jobs, alerts and selection details retain one coherent v2 basis through the Web assembler, WorldReadModel, Pixi setReadModel and HUD; wrong/newer/malformed data clears the product frame and fails closed
zh-CN/en labels, keyboard focus, non-color state cues and 1280x720 plus 1424x861 hit targets pass; main-thread frame P95 is <=16ms for the eight-resident PR-2 scene
No sim-core/Worker/protocol/schema/save/dependency, renderer authority, PR-3 command or release surface changes
requiredChecks: corepack pnpm exec vitest run apps/web/src/simulation-worker-session.test.ts packages/renderer-pixi/src/pixi-world-renderer.test.ts packages/renderer-pixi/src/render-geometry.test.ts packages/ui-react/src/shell-hud.test.ts packages/ui-react/src/localization.test.ts

history.details: Scoped the v2 consume-only default Web/Pixi/HUD presentation tranche after WM-0172; remains proposed and unclaimed.

saveLoadStance: Presentation state, interpolation, selection and speed controls are never save authority. GameSession save/load remains unsupported.
forbiddenPaths: packages/sim-protocol/**, packages/sim-worker/**, packages/sim-core/** or WM-0172-owned Web session negotiation files
static fixture/reviewed-playback authority, projection-v1 default import, UI time advancement, client pathfinding or client-synthesized job/reason/progress facts
React-rendered world entities, artificial delays after authoritative completion, direct canvas dispatch as real-input acceptance or debug-payload-only evidence
work priority/direct job/generic selection/blueprint/build command, save/load, runtime dependency, release or public compatibility scope
executionLane: client-engineer; Spark is prohibited because this spans Web/Pixi/React presentation ownership, real input and product-visible behavior
singleWriterRule: WM-0173 starts only after WM-0172 is independently verified, integrated and done. WM-0174 and WM-0175 remain proposed and unclaimed.
